name: Short Slide Right
description: The whole phrase glides in from the left as one shared move; individual words reveal only by opacity, not by sliding independently. The line settles to its centered position as words light up sequentially.
notes: Layout-aware: animate the line container's x-position separately from each word's opacity. Words DO NOT slide individually — they only fade. Two GSAP tweens compose this effect: one on the line wrapper, one staggered across the word spans.
